testcase.name: test_verify_otp_without_otp_returns_validation_error
testcase.failure: tests/test_otp_email_system.py:153: in test_verify_otp_without_otp_returns_validation_error assert response.status_code == 422 E assert 429 == 422 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_login_triggers_otp_then_resend_works
testcase.failure: tests/test_otp_email_system.py:195: in test_login_triggers_otp_then_resend_works assert login_response.status_code == 200 E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_verify_otp_endpoint_accepts_trust_today_boolean
testcase.failure: tests/test_otp_email_system.py:240: in test_verify_otp_endpoint_accepts_trust_today_boolean assert response_true.status_code == 401 # Invalid OTP, but request accepted ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E assert 429 == 401 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_verify_otp_defaults_trust_today_to_false
testcase.failure: tests/test_otp_email_system.py:260: in test_verify_otp_defaults_trust_today_to_false assert response.status_code == 401 # Invalid OTP, but request accepted ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E assert 429 == 401 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
